PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.label: charged conversation
PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.instruction: a conversation that mattered - write what the topic stirred and where the two people ended up relative to each other, never a transcript

instructions.li: charged conversation - center the supplied topic and whether it drew the pair together or left friction between them
charged conversation - write the emotional landing after the exchange, using no invented quotation or hidden motive
charged conversation - let each pawn's own outlook decide what this agreement or clash meant to them

PawnDiary.DiaryInteractionGroupDef.tone: with the lingering charge of a consequential exchange

tones.li: close and attentive, following the distance between the two people
reflective but unsettled, the topic still alive after the words ended
